title: RubyThings
body:
RubyThings Mod adds in ruby ores,Ruby ores can be found in the world.Ruby Ores have their own unique tools, weapons and armour sets. 

![All Ruby Thing It Adds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/397fc80b3e763fd413ede5a387b96b1efd5a82fe.png)

![Ruby Ore In Caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37902b772db215b50dfcb087eecfa947c5ff584d.png)

![Deepslare Ruby Ore In Deep Caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33ae2180f651fffedf8f4a8fb1f519e82e0b5f2c.png)

Adds Ruby To Minecraft Fabric

If You Request I Will Make A Forge Port
